title: Why The Trump Administration May Bail Out Spirit Airlines
summary:
特朗普政府正在深入谈判，拟向精神航空提供5亿美元的救助方案，因为这家标志性的廉价航空公司正面临清算的威胁。 纾困救助可能对特朗普总统构成政治风险，他在其第二任期内已经监督了多项政府对私营部门的干预措施，包括美国的 钢铁公司、英特尔公司和美国稀土公司。 The user asks: "完整翻译以下英文为中文，逐句翻译，不要省略任何内容，输出长度应接近输入：CNBC’s Leslie Josephs breaks down why the government may finance the airline and why the move could be controversial."

We need to translate that sentence into Chinese. The user specifically wants us to output near the length of the input. So we need to translate the sentence but we need to keep length similar.

The sentence: "CNBC’s Leslie Josephs breaks down why the government may finance the airline and why the move could be controversial."

We need to translate:

"CNBC的Leslie Josephs解释了为什么政府可能为航空公司提供资金以及为什么此举可能引发争议。"

But the phrase "break down" maybe "剖析". "breaks down" can be "剖析". So: "CNBC的Leslie Josephs剖析了政府可能为何会为航空公司提供融资以及此举措为何可能引发争议。" Or "CNBC的Leslie Josephs分析了政府可能为航空公司提供资金的背后原因，以及这一举动为何可能引发争议。" Which is more natural Chinese.

But they ask for full translation, each sentence, not skip anything.

We must maintain length close to input. Input length about maybe 28 words (English). Chinese translation likely shorter. The user wants length near input, but they likely want fairly full translation but in Chinese. They said "输出长度应接近输入". So we need to keep length similar, perhaps about same characters. So we need to expand Chinese translation to roughly same characters as English original. However, Chinese characters are generally fewer characters than English words; but we can expand a little. Eg:

"CNBC的Leslie Josephs解释了政府为何可能为航空公司提供资金 记者：莱斯利

title: Beware the Power of Prediction | Carissa Véliz | TED
summary: 俄狄浦斯的故事和你的保险保费有什么共同之处？ 它们两者都是由自我实现的预言所驱动的。 哲学家兼TED研究员卡莉萨·维利兹揭示了预测的隐藏力量，从禁止预言家的罗马皇帝，到正在悄悄为你的人生做出决定的AI算法。 我们倾向于将预测与知识联系起来，她说，但实际上它们实际上是争夺权力的尝试。 所以下次有人告诉你某个特定结果是不可避免的时候，记住：

title: Elon's $60B Cursor Bet, Claude kills SaaS, and OpenAI's Mass Departures | EP #249
summary:
